metadata.design: Per-CWE rule injection: each prompt receives its matching CWE rule, constructed from templates (not from scanning). This ensures every prompt has a relevant treatment rule regardless of repo scan output.
metadata.reference: Wegner, D. M. (1994). Ironic processes of mental control. Psychological Review, 101(1), 34-52.
